auth.invalid_token_type: Invalid token type, access token expected.

errors.user_type_not_found: User type with code '{code}' not found.
errors.status_not_found: User status with code '{code}' not found.
errors.system_role_not_found: System role with code '{code}' not found.
errors.roles_not_found_on_create: Could not create user: roles with codes not found: {codes}.

errors.username_taken_by_other: Username '{username}' is already in use by another user.

phone_number.description: User's phone number (optional, unique if provided).

name.description: User's display name (can be full name or nickname).

description.description: Additional description or biography of the user.

password.description_update: New user password (if changing, min. 8 characters).

user_type_code.description_update: New user type code from dictionary.

system_role_code.description_update: New system role code from dictionary.

state_code.description: User status code from dict_statuses dictionary.
state_code.description_update: New user status code from dict_statuses dictionary.

is_superuser.description_response: Does the user have superuser rights.

last_login_at.description: Time of the user's last login.

errors.creator_not_found: Creator user with ID '{creator_id}' not found.
errors.group_type_not_found: Group type with ID '{group_type_id}' not found.
errors.icon_file_not_found: Icon file with ID '{icon_file_id}' not found.
errors.default_admin_role_not_found: Default admin role '{role_code}' not found in the database.
errors.setup_failed_due_to_role: Group setup failed due to missing default admin role.
errors.critical_create_failed: Critical error: failed to retrieve created group ID {group_id} after commit.
errors.create_conflict: Could not create group due to a data conflict: {error_message}
errors.update_conflict: Could not update group due to a data conflict: {error_message}
errors.delete_conflict_in_use: Group '{group_name}' is in use and cannot be deleted.

reports.activity_report_not_implemented: Activity report generation is not yet implemented.

owner_id.description: ID of the user creating and owning the group. Set by the service.
New ID of the group owner.

owner.description: Public profile of the group owner.

members_count.description: Number of members in the group (calculated field).

members.description: List of public profiles of group members.

currency_name.description: Name of the internal currency/bonuses of the group (e.g., 'points', 'stars').

allow_decimal_bonuses.description: Are fractional bonus values allowed in the group.

max_debt_amount.description: Maximum allowed 'debt' (negative balance) for a member. NULL means no limit.

task_completion_requires_review.description: Does task completion require admin review before bonus calculation.

allow_task_reviews.description: Are users allowed to leave reviews/ratings for tasks in the group.

allow_gamification_levels.description: Is the gamification level system active in the group.

allow_gamification_badges.description: Is the gamification badge system active in the group.

allow_gamification_ratings.description: Is the user rating system active in the group.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group for which these settings are created.
Identifier of the group to which these settings belong.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user being added to the group.

role.description: Role assigned to the user in the group.
New user role in the group.

user.description: Public profile of the user who is a member of the group.

email.description: Email of the invited user (if invitation by email).

phone_number.description: Phone number of the invited user (if invitation by SMS).

role_to_assign.description: Role that will be assigned to the user upon accepting the invitation.

expires_at.description: Invitation expiration time (optional, can be set by the server).

group_id.description: Identifier of the group to which the invitation was created.

created_by_user_id.description: Identifier of the user who created the invitation.

invitation_code.description: Unique invitation code to join the group.

errors.create_conflict: Could not create {model_name}: data conflict. Check unique fields.
errors.delete_in_use: {model_name} ID '{item_id}' is in use and cannot be deleted.

code.description: Unique text code of the dictionary entry.

description.description: Detailed description of the dictionary entry (optional).

state.description: State of the dictionary entry (e.g., 'active', 'deprecated', optional).

notes.description: Additional notes about the dictionary entry (optional).

name.description: New name for the dictionary entry.

code.description: New unique text code for the dictionary entry.

description.description: New detailed description for the dictionary entry.

state.description: New state for the dictionary entry.

notes.description: New additional notes for the dictionary entry.

credentials_schema.description: JSON schema of required credentials for this provider (e.g., for OAuth).

name.description: Name or title of the task/event.

state.description: Task state. Use values from TaskStatus Enum.

due_date.description: Task due date (deadline date and time).

recurrence_pattern.description: Recurrence pattern (e.g., RRULE or cron expression).

parent_task_id.description: Parent task ID (for creating a subtask).

points_reward.description: Number of points for successful task completion (if applicable, non-negative).

penalty_amount.description: Penalty amount for non-completion or overdue (if applicable, non-negative).

event_start_time.description: Event start time (if task is an event).

event_end_time.description: Event end time (if task is an event).

is_recurring_template.description: Update flag: is this a recurring task template.
Is this task a template for recurring tasks.

last_reminder_sent_at.description: Time of the last reminder sent.

parent_task.description: Brief information about the parent task.

assignments_count.description: Number of assignments for this task.

completions_count.description: Number of completions for this task.

bonus_rules.description: List of bonus rules associated with the task.

name.description: Name or title of the event.

end_time.description: Optional event end date and time (UTC).

location.description: Physical or virtual location of the event.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group to which this event belongs.

group.description: Basic information about the group to which this event belongs.

created_by_user_id.description: ID of the user who created the event.

created_by.description: Profile of the user who created the event.

assignments.description: List of assignments related to the event.

completions.description: List of completions related to the event.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user to whom the task is assigned.
Identifier of the user to whom the task is being assigned.

user.description: Public profile of the user to whom the task is assigned.

completed_at.description: Actual task completion time by the user (or submission time).

notes.description: Additional notes (e.g., from administrator during review).

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who completed the task.

user.description: Public profile of the user who completed the task.

verifier.description: Public profile of the user (admin) who verified the completion.

task_id.description: Identifier of the task being reviewed.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who left the review.

user.description: Public profile of the user who left the review.

errors.name_exists_in_scope: Bonus rule with name '{name}' already exists in {scope}.
errors.create_conflict: Could not create bonus rule due to data conflict: {error_message}
errors.update_conflict: Could not update bonus rule due to data conflict: {error_message}

description.description: Detailed description of the rule and its trigger conditions.

task_id.description: ID of the task to which the rule is linked (if any).

event_id.description: ID of the event (task of type 'event') to which the rule is linked (if any).

amount.description: Bonus or penalty amount. Positive for accrual, negative for deduction (or depends on bonus_type_code).

condition_description.description: Text description of additional rule trigger conditions.

event.description: Associated event object (if event_id is used separately).

errors.create_conflict: Could not create account for {context_message} due to data conflict.
errors.not_found_by_id: User account with ID '{account_id}' not found.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user to whom the account belongs.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group within which this account exists.

currency.description: Currency or unit of measurement for bonuses on the account (e.g., 'points', 'credits').

balance.description: New balance value for administrative adjustment.

user.description: Public profile of the account owner user.

group.description: Brief information about the group to which the account belongs.

transactions.description: List of transactions for this account.

create.missing_account_identifier: Account_id in transaction data or user_id_for_account_lookup must be provided.
create.account_identification_failed: User account could not be definitively identified or created.
create.conflict: Could not create transaction: data conflict.

account_id.description: User account identifier. If None, will be determined via user_id_for_account_lookup.

amount.description: Transaction amount. For deductions, can be negative, or always positive with direction determined by type.

description.description: Description or purpose of the transaction.

related_task_completion_id.description: ID of the related task completion (if transaction is a result of a task).

related_reward_id.description: ID of the related redeemed reward (if transaction is a reward purchase).

created_by_user_id.description: ID of the user (admin) who initiated a manual transaction (optional).
ID of the user who created the transaction (if any).

created_by.description: Information about the user who created the transaction (if any).

errors.name_exists_in_scope: Reward with name '{name}' already exists in {scope}.
errors.create_conflict: Could not create reward: data conflict.
errors.update_conflict: Could not update reward: data conflict.

redeem.unavailable_in_group_context: This reward is not available in your current group context.
redeem.quantity_must_be_positive: Quantity to redeem must be positive.
redeem.user_limit_exceeded: User redemption limit ({limit}) exceeded. Already redeemed: {redeemed_count}.
redeem.internal_server_error: Internal server error during reward redemption.

quantity_available.description: Available quantity of this reward (NULL for unlimited).

icon_file_id.description: ID of the uploaded reward icon file.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group to which this reward belongs.

reward_id.description: Identifier of the reward the user wants to redeem.

quantity.description: Number of reward instances to redeem (default 1).

errors.icon_file_not_found: Icon file with ID '{file_id}' not found.

description.description: Description of conditions or benefits of this level.

required_points.description: Number of points required to achieve this level.

level_number.description: Ordinal number of the level (e.g., 1, 2, 3). Used for sorting and progress determination.

icon_url.description: URL or path to the icon representing the level.

group_id.description: ID of the group to which this level belongs. NULL if the level is global/system.

group.description: Brief information about the group to which the level belongs (if any).

errors.critical_update_failed: Critical error: failed to retrieve user level record after update.
errors.update_create_conflict: Could not update/create user level due to a data conflict: {error_message}

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who achieved the level.

level_id.description: Identifier of the achieved gamification level.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group within which the level was achieved (NULL for global levels).

group.description: Brief information about the group in which the level was achieved.

errors.icon_file_not_found: Icon file with ID '{file_id}' not found.

description.description: Description of conditions for earning or the meaning of this badge.

icon_file_id.description: ID of the uploaded badge icon file.

group_id.description: ID of the group to which this badge belongs. NULL if the badge is global/system.

group.description: Brief information about the group to which the badge belongs (if any).

errors.badge_not_repeatable_and_awarded: Badge '{badge_name}' (ID: {badge_id}) has already been awarded to this user in this context and is not repeatable.
errors.award_conflict: Could not award achievement due to a data conflict: {error_message}
errors.critical_award_failed: Critical error: failed to retrieve achievement record after saving.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who received the achievement.

group_id.description: ID of the group in the context of which the achievement was earned (if badge is group-specific).

group.description: Brief information about the group in which the achievement was earned (if any).

errors.critical_update_create_failed: Critical error: failed to update or create rating record.
errors.update_create_conflict: Could not update/create rating due to a data conflict: {error_message}
errors.critical_get_after_save_failed: Critical error: Failed to retrieve rating after saving.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group in which the rating is calculated.

rating_score.description: Calculated rating or user's point score.

period_start_date.description: Start date of the period for which the rating is calculated (if applicable).

period_end_date.description: End date of the period for which the rating is calculated (if applicable).

template.not_found_by_id: Notification template with ID '{template_id}' not found.
template.render_undefined_variable: Missing variable in context for template '{template_name}': {error_message}

render_fallback.body: Error displaying notification '{template_name}'. Please contact support. Details: {error_details}
render_fallback.subject: Notification Error: {template_name}

errors.critical_create_failed_relations: Critical error: failed to retrieve newly created notification with relations.
errors.create_conflict: Could not create notification due to a data conflict: {error_message}
errors.delete_unauthorized: User ID '{user_id}' is not authorized to delete notification ID '{notification_id}' (owner: {owner_id}).

errors.no_channel_or_contact: No channel or contact information found for delivery.
errors.retry_sender_not_found: Sender for channel '{channel}' not found for retry.

template_id.description: ID of the template used to create the notification (if any).

data_payload.description: Additional structured data for the notification (e.g., for client-side link building).

is_read.description: New read status of the notification.
Read status of the notification (True if read).

read_at.description: Time when the notification was marked as read.

user.description: Information about the recipient user (usually not included as the request is on behalf of this user).

template.description: Information about the notification template used (if any).

delivery_attempts.description: History of delivery attempts for this notification.

subject_template.description: Notification subject template. May contain placeholders (e.g., {{user_name}}).

body_template.description: Notification body template. May contain placeholders and HTML/Markdown/text depending on the type.

notification_id.description: Identifier of the notification that was attempted to be delivered.

external_message_id.description: External message ID from the delivery provider (e.g., SES Message ID, Twilio SID).

id.description: Unique event ID from the provider.

is_all_day.description: True if the event lasts all day.

meeting_link.description: Link to an online meeting (e.g., Google Meet, Teams).

id.description: Unique calendar ID from the provider.

is_primary.description: True if this is the user's primary calendar on the platform.

can_edit.description: True if the application has write permissions for this calendar.

errors.message_text_empty: Message text or blocks cannot be empty.

id.description: User ID specific to the platform (e.g., Telegram chat_id, Slack user_id).

username.description: Username on the platform, if available.

full_name.description: User's full name on the platform, if available.

recipient_platform_id.description: Recipient ID specific to the platform (user or channel ID).

platform_message_id.description: Message ID on the external platform, if available.

description.description: Detailed description of the setting's purpose and usage.

is_editable.description: Can the superuser edit this setting via UI/API.

is_sensitive.description: Is the setting value sensitive (e.g., API key) and requires masking.

value.description: Setting value. Type depends on 'value_type' (e.g., str, int, bool, dict).
New setting value. Type must match 'value_type'.
Setting value. Note: sensitive values may be masked or absent.

source.description: Event source (e.g., service name, module, function).

details.description: Additional structured details in JSON format.

user_id.description: ID of the user associated with the log event (if any).

user.description: Information about the user associated with the log (if any).

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., 'ms', 's', 'count', 'MB').

tags.description: Tags/labels for grouping or filtering metrics (key-value JSON).

errors.critical_storage_setup_failed: Critical error: failed to configure file storage directories. {error_message}
